No new files, handles, network clients, or cleanup paths introduced by the import-version refresh.

Resource lifetime and garbage-collection settings unchanged by this refresh.
No new CRUD lifecycle surface requested or introduced; existing read-only/audit/lifecycle method set unchanged.
Existing preflight/check definitions unchanged; dependency pins do not bypass checks.
